title: XPUtils
description: Small Plugin for Exporting Your Hard-Earned Experience.
body:
# XPUtils
A way to convert your hard-earned experience to bottles for later use. Formerly known as XPExport.

Plugin provides command to export and view your current xp

## Commands
`/exportxp (amount/all)` - export your xp

`/currentxp` - view your current xp

`/transferxp (amount/all) (player)` - give your xp to other online player

`/getxp` - convert XP bottles in your inventory to XP
